svg.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
svg.title: Estimated billable GitHub Actions minutes per week, by workflow
svg.desc: Horizontal bar chart of estimated billable minutes per week for the lightwork repo, by workflow category. CI (lint, unit, end-to-end shards, deploys) about 2,016 minutes is the dominant cost; bundle size about 629; everything else about 239; release channel preview about 190. CI gates and deploys every change and is the lion's share of the bill.
svg.text: Estimated billable Actions minutes / week — by workflow
CI gates and deploys every change — the lion's share of the bill.
